# Boniface Kagunda Music

> Sacred music compositions, choral arrangements, and liturgical works by Kenyan composer Boniface Kagunda — Mass settings, responsorial psalms, SATB arrangements, and bespoke songs for cantors and soloists.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction to Boniface Kagunda and his sacred music catalog.
- [About](/about): Background, composing principles, and approach to liturgical music.
- [Compositions](/compositions): Browseable catalog of scores synced from MuseScore.
- [Contact](/contact): Commission inquiries, services offered, and FAQs.
